event: Scene related to the founding of Rome — figures in an architectural setting
symbols: towered building with crenellations — civic authority and urban life in a medieval Italian city
domestic interior scene below — the continuity of daily life within the framework of great historical events
description: A vertical fresco fragment showing a tall medieval Italian building with a crenellated tower at the upper right, featuring rows of arched bifora windows with delicate columns — a lower row of paired arches and an upper row of Gothic pointed arches. Below the tower, colored heraldic shields or decorative panels adorn the wall. At the ground level, an open loggia or covered porch with a wooden beam ceiling shelters a domestic scene: two or three figures in robes are gathered around what appears to be a seated or reclining figure in white, possibly tending to someone.
